title: Why Cloudflare (NET) Is Up 17.3% After Forrester Names It an Edge Platform Leader
text: Cloudflare experienced a significant stock price increase following Forrester's recognition of the company as an Edge Platform Leader. The stock surged 17.3% following the analyst designation, which highlighted Cloudflare's strong position in edge computing and AI infrastructure capabilities. Forrester's recognition comes on the heels of the company's Q1 2026 earnings beat and announcement of its AI-first restructuring. The endorsement validates management's strategic direction toward leveraging AI and edge computing to drive future growth. The analyst firm noted Cloudflare's comprehensive edge platform capabilities, including Workers AI, network optimization, and security services. The positive analyst coverage helped offset some of the market skepticism regarding the workforce reduction announcement, with investors focusing on the long-term growth potential of the company's AI infrastructure plays. The Forrester designation reinforces Cloudflare's positioning as a key player in the AI and edge computing infrastructure buildout.
